response.justification: Strong generalist software craftsman with ~15 years of polyglot full-stack experience, but the resume shows minimal direct AI/ML work, no recognized AI products or platforms, no advanced degree, and no evidence of director-level technical leadership or strategic advisory work with cloud/AI customers required for a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience with an open-source platform shows entrepreneurial drive
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise
No master's/PhD and no director-level IC or strategic leadership track record
Limited large-scale cloud platform strategy and customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and products
